items.title: Circular Economy
items.description: A Bitcoin circular economy is a local or digital ecosystem where participants earn, spend, and save bitcoin without converting back to fiat. The goal is to close the loop: merchants accept bitcoin, employees and suppliers are paid in bitcoin, and the community reinvests in bitcoin-native goods and services.

items.title: IBEXPay
items.description: Merchant payment processor for accepting Bitcoin via Lightning and on-chain. Targets businesses from single-location shops to multi-location chains.

items.title: OpenNode
items.description: Bitcoin payment processor for businesses. Settles payments via Lightning and on-chain with an API, e-commerce plugins, and hosted payment pages.

items.title: Oshi App
items.description: Bitcoin rewards and marketing platform for local businesses. Replaces traditional loyalty stars, punch cards, and points with bitcoin-backed incentives.
